cafes.tip: Visit in the morning for the best light and views of Shangri-La's old town. Try their Yunnan single-origin pour-over to experience local coffee beans.

cafes.name: Dukezong Ancient City, Shangri-La Administration Committee
cafes.address: RP65+5CX, Jin Long Jie, Xiang Ge Li La Shi, Di Qing Zang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 674400
cafes.name_en: Dukezong Ancient City, Shangri-La Administration Committee
cafes.chinese: 独克宗古城管理委员会
cafes.tip: This is an administrative office for the ancient city district, not a cafe. Visit the surrounding Dukezong Ancient City for authentic Tibetan teahouses and cafes instead.

attractions.name: Yiliang Jiuxiang Scenic Area
attractions.address: China, Yun Nan Sheng, Kun Ming Shi, Yi Liang Xian, 风老段九乡彝族回族乡境内 邮政编码: 652114
attractions.summary: Scenic natural area boasting tours, a complex underground cave system & colorful lighting.
attractions.description: Spectacular underground wonderland featuring illuminated karst caves, subterranean rivers, and dramatic waterfalls carved over millions of years. The extensive cave system rivals Guilin's formations but with far fewer crowds, offering intimate encounters with nature's artistry.
attractions.tip: Wear sturdy non-slip shoes as cave paths can be wet and slippery. Visit on weekdays to avoid tour groups, and bring a light jacket since cave temperatures stay around 16°C year-round.

attractions.name: Stone Forest Scenic Area
attractions.address: R88H+RMW, Shilin Yi Autonomous County, Kunming, Yunnan, China, 652207
attractions.summary: Rocky, karst parkland featuring a forest of tall limestone formations & green trees.
attractions.description: Towering limestone pillars rise like a petrified forest across 400 square kilometers, creating one of nature's most spectacular geological wonders. The dramatic karst formations, some reaching 30 meters high, offer maze-like paths through ancient stone corridors that are 270 million years in the making.
attractions.tip: Visit the Minor Stone Forest (Naigu Stone Forest) section first thing in the morning before tour groups arrive. The black limestone formations there are more dramatic and far less crowded than the main area.

restaurants.name: Crowne Plaza Kunming Ancient Dian
restaurants.address: China, Yun Nan Sheng, Kun Ming Shi, Jin Ning Qu, 18, 古滇名城皇冠假日酒店 邮政编码: 650606
restaurants.chinese: 昆明古滇皇冠假日酒店
restaurants.tip: Hotel restaurant offering international buffet and Chinese cuisine. Best for breakfast buffet with lake views. Book window seats in advance for scenic Dianchi Lake panoramas.

restaurants.name: Sujixiang
restaurants.address: China, Yun Nan Sheng, Kun Ming Shi, Wu Hua Qu, Qing Yun Jie, 50号昆明糖果糕点大楼 邮政编码: 650091
restaurants.tip: Arrive early for lunch as popular vegetarian dishes sell out quickly. Try the stir-fried wild mushrooms, a Yunnan specialty that showcases local forest ingredients perfectly.

restaurants.name: Hongdouyuan Restaurant
restaurants.address: 144 Wen Lin Jie, Wu Hua Qu, Kun Ming Shi, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 650031
restaurants.tip: Popular for traditional Yunnan cuisine. Try the steam pot chicken and wild mushroom dishes during summer and autumn when they're freshest and most flavorful.

cafes.name: Coffee
cafes.address: 27 Qian Ju Jie, Wu Hua Qu, Kun Ming Shi, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 650091
cafes.tip: A local favorite in Kunming serving Yunnan's renowned coffee beans. Visit in the morning for the freshest brew and quieter atmosphere to enjoy authentic regional coffee.

cafes.name: City Garden Coffee Shop
cafes.address: 136 Wu Jing Lu, Guan Du Qu, Kun Ming Shi, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 650011
cafes.tip: Visit in the afternoon for a quieter atmosphere and better window seats overlooking the garden area. Their Yunnan single-origin pour-over highlights local coffee beans.

cafes.name: Qingcheng Coffee
cafes.address: 92 Hua Shan Xi Lu, Wu Hua Qu, Kun Ming Shi, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 650091
cafes.tip: Try their Yunnan single-origin pour-over to taste local coffee beans. Arrive early morning for the freshest brews and quieter atmosphere before the lunch crowd.

cafes.name: Breath Coffee
cafes.address: China, Kun Ming Shi, Wu Hua Qu, CN 云南省 昆明市 五华区 3 层E3-02 邮政编码: 650021
cafes.tip: A hidden gem perfect for quiet mornings. Try their hand-drip coffee for the best flavor experience. Arrive early on weekends to secure a window seat.

cafes.name: Century Story Coffee Station
cafes.address: 10 Qing Yun Jie, 10, Wu Hua Qu, Kun Ming Shi, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 650091
cafes.tip: A hidden gem in Kunming with a perfect 5-star rating. Ideal for a peaceful coffee break away from tourist crowds. Try their hand-brewed pour-over selections.

attractions.name: Suzhou Museum
attractions.address: 204 Dong Bei Jie, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
attractions.summary: Museum designed by I. M. Pei housing Chinese artifacts, including calligraphy & ancient craftwares.
attractions.description: I.M. Pei's final masterpiece blends modern geometry with classical Suzhou garden aesthetics, creating a serene sanctuary for Chinese antiquities. The architecture itself rivals the collection of ancient calligraphy, ceramics, and jade housed within its minimalist halls.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings when tour groups haven't arrived yet. The museum garden's reflective pools photograph best in soft morning light, and you'll have the calligraphy galleries nearly to yourself.

attractions.name: Classical Gardens of Suzhou
attractions.address: 178 Dong Bei Jie, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215004
attractions.summary: Built over 1000 years, from the 11th-19th centuries, these gardens define the Chinese style.
attractions.description: Nine UNESCO-listed gardens built by scholars and nobles over eight centuries showcase the pinnacle of Chinese landscape design with exquisite rockeries, pavilions, and reflective ponds. These masterpieces of miniature nature reveal how ancient elites created entire worlds within courtyard walls.
attractions.tip: Visit Humble Administrator's Garden before 8am when gates open to avoid tour groups, or explore the quieter Master of Nets Garden which offers magical evening performances with traditional music in summer months.

attractions.name: 留园
attractions.address: 338 Liu Yuan Lu, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215008
attractions.summary: Classical 16th century Chinese mountain & water garden & UNESCO World Heritage Site.
attractions.description: This exquisite 16th-century UNESCO garden masterfully layers pavilions, rockeries, and moon gates across four distinct scenic sections. Each carefully composed view demonstrates the pinnacle of classical Chinese garden design through borrowed scenery and poetic spatial transitions.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings before 9am to photograph the reflections in the central pond without crowds. The western section with ancient bonsai trees is often overlooked but showcases rare specimens over 200 years old.

attractions.name: Lion Grove Garden
attractions.address: 23 Yuan Lin Lu, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
attractions.summary: Modest Chinese garden with extensive stone arrangements, a water feature & an elaborate pavilion.
attractions.description: A UNESCO-listed classical garden famous for its labyrinthine rockery resembling a pride of lions frozen in stone. Wander through winding cave passages beneath fantastical rock formations that have captivated visitors since the Yuan Dynasty.
attractions.tip: The rockery maze can be disorienting—stick to the right-hand wall to navigate through systematically. Visit early morning to explore the caves without crowds blocking the narrow passages.

restaurants.name: 吴门人家
restaurants.address: 38 Xi Pan Ru Xiang, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
restaurants.tip: Traditional Suzhou home-style cooking in the heart of the old town. Try their local specialties like squirrel-shaped mandarin fish and sweet-and-sour spare ribs for authentic flavors.

cafes.name: Sparrow Coffee
cafes.address: 681 Shi Quan Jie, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
cafes.tip: Tucked away in Gusu Old Town's historic lanes, this cozy spot is perfect for a mid-morning break while exploring nearby gardens and traditional architecture.

cafes.name: Fang Coffee
cafes.address: 172 Wu Que Qiao Lu, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
cafes.tip: Tucked away in Gusu Old Town's historic lanes, this hidden gem serves expertly crafted pour-overs. Visit mid-morning for the quietest atmosphere and freshest beans.

cafes.name: Einstein Coffee
cafes.address: China, Su Zhou Shi, Wu Zhong Qu, 东265号265号1楼 Su Zhou Xian Dai Chuan Mei Guang Chang - Yan Bo Lou CN 江苏省 苏州市 吴中区 苏州大道 邮政编码: 215122
cafes.tip: Hidden gem in the old town offering quality coffee away from tourist crowds. Visit in the morning for a quieter atmosphere and freshly brewed specialty drinks.

cafes.name: Ancient Ape Coffee
cafes.address: 8JCJ+5WR, Ping Jiang Lu, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
cafes.tip: Hidden gem in Gusu Old Town perfect for a quiet afternoon break. Try their hand-drip coffee while exploring the historic neighborhood's traditional streets and canals.

cafes.name: Fei Coffee
cafes.address: 937 Ren Min Lu, 937, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
cafes.tip: Hidden gem in Gusu Old Town's historic alleyways. Visit in the afternoon to enjoy specialty pour-overs in a tranquil setting away from tourist crowds.

cafes.name: Ji Coffee
cafes.address: 30 Niu Jia Xiang, 30, Gu Su Qu, Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
cafes.tip: A hidden gem in Gusu's western district. Perfect for a quiet afternoon break while exploring the historic area. Try their hand-drip coffee selections.

attractions.name: Suzhou City, Zhouzhuang Resorts
attractions.address: China, Jiang Su Sheng, Su Zhou Shi, Kun Shan Shi, 云海路 邮政编码: 215325
attractions.description: Ancient canals weave through 900-year-old stone bridges and whitewashed Ming-Qing dynasty houses in this Venice of the East. Come for the iconic Twin Bridges that grace Chinese currency and stay to watch local life unfold along the waterways.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings before 9am to photograph the misty canals without tour groups, and enter through the less-crowded west gate near Fugui Garden for immediate canal views.

restaurants.name: Songhelou
restaurants.address: 72 Tai Jian Nong, 太监弄平江区 Su Zhou Shi, Jiang Su Sheng, China, 215005
restaurants.tip: Order their signature squirrel-shaped mandarin fish (松鼠鳜鱼), a Suzhou classic with sweet-sour sauce. Arrive early for lunch to avoid long waits at this historic establishment.

cafes.name: Espresso Barista
cafes.address: China, 1, Wu Jiang Qu, 同里古镇景区 CN 江苏省 苏州市 邮政编码: 215217
cafes.tip: Perfect pit stop after exploring Suzhou's water towns. Arrive early morning for freshly roasted beans and a quiet seat by the window before tourist crowds arrive.

cafes.name: Water Paradise Food Cafe
cafes.address: China, Jiang Su Sheng, Su Zhou Shi, Kun Shan Shi, 萧林路CX32+GV6 邮政编码: 215335
cafes.tip: Ideal rest stop while exploring Suzhou's water towns. Grab a window seat for canal views and try their local-style coffee paired with traditional snacks.

cafes.name: Echo Coffee Bar
cafes.address: China, Jiang Su Sheng, Su Zhou Shi, Gu Su Qu, 山塘街苏州山塘街8J92+2JF 邮政编码: 215008
cafes.tip: Perfect escape from the busy water towns. Arrive mid-afternoon for a quieter atmosphere and try their specialty latte with a river view seat.

attractions.name: Jiuzhai Valley National Park
attractions.address: Jiuzhaigou County, Ngawa Tibetan and Qiang Autonomous Prefecture, Sichuan, China, 623402
attractions.summary: Mountainous national park known for colorful lakes, waterfalls, Tibetan villages & rare wildlife.
attractions.description: This UNESCO World Heritage site showcases ethereal turquoise lakes, multi-tiered waterfalls, and snow-capped peaks across three pristine valleys. The mineral-rich waters create impossibly vivid colors that shift from emerald to sapphire, making it China's most visually stunning natural wonder.
attractions.tip: Enter at 7am when gates open to photograph the mirror lakes before tour groups arrive and winds disturb the water. Take the shuttle bus to the highest point first, then work your way down to avoid crowds.

attractions.name: Jiuzhaigou National Geological Park
attractions.address: 46 村一组, Zha Ru, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Si Chuan Sheng, China, 623402
attractions.description: This UNESCO World Heritage Site showcases otherworldly turquoise lakes, multi-tiered waterfalls, and snow-capped peaks across pristine alpine valleys. The kaleidoscope of colored pools and ancient Tibetan villages create one of China's most breathtaking natural spectacles.
attractions.tip: Enter as early as possible at 7am to beat tour groups and catch mirror-perfect lake reflections in morning light. Take the shuttle bus to the furthest points first, then work your way down on foot.

attractions.name: Shuzhengzhai
attractions.address: China, Si Chuan Sheng, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, Z1205VXV+CWW 邮政编码: 623402
attractions.description: A traditional Tibetan village nestled within Jiuzhaigou Valley, where colorful prayer flags flutter above wooden houses and local families maintain their ancestral way of life. Experience authentic Tibetan culture while exploring handicraft shops and admiring the stunning valley backdrop between waterfall visits.
attractions.tip: Stop at the small family-run restaurants for authentic yak butter tea and tsampa. Visit early morning to see locals performing traditional morning rituals and avoid tour group crowds that arrive mid-morning.

attractions.name: 珍珠滩瀑布
attractions.address: 5V8Q+6GH, Jiuzhaigou County, Ngawa Tibetan and Qiang Autonomous Prefecture, Sichuan, China, 623402
attractions.summary: Wide, multi-section falls cascading over rugged cliffs in a wooded setting, at peak flow in autumn.
attractions.description: This spectacular 320-meter-wide curtain of water plunges 28 meters over calcified cliffs, creating a thunderous display in a primeval forest setting. Famous as a filming location for Journey to the West, the falls reach peak flow and drama during autumn months.
attractions.tip: Visit in morning for better lighting and fewer crowds. The viewing platform 100 meters downstream offers the best full panorama shot, while the platform at the falls' base captures the powerful cascade up close.

restaurants.name: Ming Wei Yi Niu
restaurants.address: China, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, CN 四川省 阿坝藏族羌族自治州 九寨沟县 漳扎村一组 26 26号附4 邮政编码: 623402
restaurants.tip: Specializes in beef dishes. Try the hot pot with yak meat, a local specialty in the Tibetan plateau region. Arrive early during peak tourist season.

restaurants.name: Jiuzhai The Grand Hotel Restaurant
restaurants.address: China, Si Chuan Sheng, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, 301省道7WC4+76G 邮政编码: 623402
restaurants.tip: Hotel restaurant serving buffet-style meals with Sichuan and Tibetan options. Best for breakfast before early park entry. Book ahead during peak season.

restaurants.name: 泸州餐馆
restaurants.address: 8PFP+5GP, Jishou, Xiangxi Tujia and Miao Autonomous Prefecture, Hunan, China, 416000
restaurants.tip: Try the Sichuan-style preserved pork and locally-sourced mushrooms. Visit during lunch hours for fresher ingredients. Portions are generous, so order conservatively.

cafes.name: Hilton Jiuzhaigou Resort
cafes.address: 漳扎镇, Jiuzhaigou County, Ngawa Tibetan and Qiang Autonomous Prefecture, Sichuan, China, 623402
cafes.chinese: 九寨沟希尔顿度假酒店
cafes.tip: Visit the lobby lounge for afternoon tea with mountain views. Book ahead during peak season as it's popular with hotel guests and day visitors alike.

cafes.name: Jiujiu Bujian Cafe
cafes.address: China, Ling Shui Li Zu Zi Zhi Xian, CN 海南省 陵水黎族自治县 180 米 邮政编码: 572427
cafes.tip: A cozy spot to warm up after exploring Jiuzhaigou's valleys. Try their local Tibetan butter tea alongside coffee for an authentic highland experience.

cafes.name: Week Nine Coffee
cafes.address: 196 Long Jiang Lu, Lu Shui Shi, Nu Jiang Li Su Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 673299
cafes.tip: A rare coffee stop in Jiuzhaigou's Rize area. Arrive early morning before tour groups for a quieter atmosphere and freshly brewed coffee to fuel your valley exploration.

cafes.name: Jueshidao Coffee Shop
cafes.address: V7H2+364, Sheng Li Nan Lu Er Duan, Xi Chang Shi, Liang Shan Yi Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Si Chuan Sheng, China, 615042
cafes.tip: Warm up with a hot coffee after exploring the chilly valley. Located in Rize area, it's a convenient rest stop between scenic zone visits.

cafes.name: Dream Jiuzhai
cafes.address: China, Si Chuan Sheng, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, 301省道7VV9+68G 邮政编码: 623402
cafes.tip: Stop here for warming beverages and light snacks between valley sightseeing. Arrive early morning for fresh pastries before tour groups fill the space. Limited seating during peak season.

restaurants.name: InterContinental Resort Jiuzhai Paradise
restaurants.address: China, Si Chuan Sheng, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, 漳扎镇甘海子 邮政编码: 623402
restaurants.summary: Upscale resort offering mountain views and posh lodgings, plus a glass atrium, a spa & 2 pools.
restaurants.tip: Book dinner reservations in advance during peak season. Try the Tibetan-Sichuan fusion dishes at their signature restaurant. Breakfast buffet offers stunning mountain views from the glass atrium.

restaurants.name: Rissai Valley, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve
restaurants.address: 26 二组, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Si Chuan Sheng, China, 623402
restaurants.chinese: 丽思谷丽思卡尔顿臻选酒店
restaurants.tip: Book the Tibetan-inspired tasting menu in advance. Request window seating for stunning valley views during dinner service, especially at sunset.

restaurants.name: Piedmont Hot Spring Villa
restaurants.address: China, Si Chuan Sheng, A Ba Zang Zu Qiang Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Jiu Zhai Gou Xian, Zhang Zha Zhen, Peng Feng Cun, 47号 邮政编码: 623402
restaurants.tip: Best visited after a day exploring Jiuzhaigou Valley. Try their warming hot pot dishes which pair perfectly with the hot spring facilities available on-site.

cafes.name: Jazz Island Coffee
cafes.address: 242 San Cha Kou Nan Lu, Xi Chang Shi, Liang Shan Yi Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Si Chuan Sheng, China, 615099
cafes.tip: Stop here for a warming coffee break before or after exploring Zechawa Valley. Try their hot drinks to combat the high-altitude chill.

cafes.name: Jazz Island Coffee Flagship Store
cafes.address: China, Si Chuan Sheng, Liang Shan Yi Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Xi Chang Shi, Xi Men Po Jie, 96号3楼96水晶城 邮政编码: 615099
cafes.tip: Stop here for a quality coffee break before or after visiting Jiuzhaigou's Zechawa Valley. Try their signature lattes to warm up in cooler months.

attractions.name: Harbin Ice & Snow World
attractions.address: China, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, Ha Er Bin Shi, Dao Li Qu, 兆麟公园 邮政编码: 150036
attractions.description: The world's largest ice and snow theme park transforms into a glittering frozen wonderland each winter, with colossal ice castles, palaces, and sculptures illuminated by rainbow LED lights. Walk through life-sized replicas of global landmarks carved entirely from ice, ride frozen slides, and experience architecture on an otherworldly scale.
attractions.tip: Visit after 4pm when the LED lights switch on for the most spectacular views. Bring hand warmers and wear double-layer gloves—metal handrails on ice slides get painfully cold even through regular gloves.

attractions.name: Harbin Music Park
attractions.address: QH2C+WXV, You Yi Xi Lu, Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150076
attractions.description: This modern riverside park in Songbei district celebrates Harbin's musical heritage with striking sculptural installations and concert venues along the Songhua River. The architectural pavilions and open-air performance spaces create a harmonious blend of nature and culture against stunning river views.
attractions.tip: Visit during weekday mornings for peaceful walks without crowds, or check the park's schedule for free outdoor concerts on summer weekends when local orchestras perform at the main pavilion.

attractions.name: Bingxue Big World
attractions.address: QHCH+9Q3, Song Bei Da Dao, 太阳岛 Song Bei Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150010
attractions.summary: Winter wonderland featuring ice sculptures, mazes, bikes, snow sports & slides, along with concerts.
attractions.description: The world's largest ice and snow theme park transforms 60 football fields worth of space into a luminous fantasy of colossal ice castles, glowing sculptures, and frozen architecture. Come after dark when LED lights illuminate the crystalline structures in a kaleidoscope of colors, creating an otherworldly spectacle unlike anywhere else on earth.
attractions.tip: Wear thermal underwear and bring heat packs for your shoes—temperatures drop to -30°C at night. Arrive right at 4pm when gates open to photograph in twilight before crowds surge after 6pm.

attractions.name: Taiyangdao Park
attractions.address: QHMP+GM7, Tai Yang Da Dao, Song Bei Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150010
attractions.description: This expansive riverside park on the northern bank of the Songhua River offers wetlands, meadows, and Russian-influenced gardens across its scenic grounds. A peaceful escape from urban Harbin, perfect for leisurely walks, cycling, and enjoying Siberian-style nature within the city.
attractions.tip: Rent a bicycle at the entrance to explore the park efficiently—it's much larger than it appears, and walking the entire area can take hours. Visit the Russian Art Museum inside for a quick cultural stop.

attractions.name: Ice and Snow World Theme Park
attractions.address: China, Ha Er Bin Shi, Song Bei Qu, CN 黑龙江省 哈尔滨市 松北区 60 米 邮政编码: 150010
attractions.description: The world's largest ice and snow theme park transforms into a frozen wonderland of towering ice castles, intricate sculptures, and illuminated palaces carved from Songhua River ice. Visit after dark when thousands of LED lights bring the crystalline structures to life in a spectacular display of color and craftsmanship.
attractions.tip: Wear thermal layers and waterproof boots with good grip—temperatures drop to -30°C and ice surfaces are slippery. Bring hand warmers and visit between 4-6pm to see both daylight details and the evening light show without staying too long in extreme cold.

restaurants.name: Common People Meishizhai
restaurants.address: 23 Sen Lin Jie, Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150010
restaurants.tip: A local favorite in Songbei North serving authentic Dongbei cuisine. Try their hearty stews and dumplings. Visit during lunch for the freshest selections and fewer crowds.

cafes.name: Luyu Coffee
cafes.address: 43 Hong Zhuan Jie, 中央大街 Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150020
cafes.tip: Try their signature hot latte during Harbin's freezing winters. The cozy interior makes it an ideal warm-up spot after exploring the nearby Songbei riverside areas.

cafes.name: Simeng Coffee
cafes.address: 167 Zhong Yang Da Jie, 中央大街 Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150020
cafes.tip: A hidden gem in Songbei's quieter north area. Perfect for escaping tourist crowds. Try their hand-drip coffee and pair it with homemade desserts for an authentic local café experience.

cafes.name: Xididao Coffee Harbin Head Office
cafes.address: 9 Shang Hai Jie, Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150010
cafes.chinese: 西堤岛咖啡哈尔滨总店
cafes.tip: Try their specialty coffee blends roasted in-house. Visit during weekday mornings for a quieter atmosphere and freshest brews. Their local Harbin-style pastries pair perfectly with espresso drinks.

cafes.name: H Zijia Bakery Cafe
cafes.address: 54 Hong Zhuan Jie, Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150010
cafes.tip: Try their freshly baked pastries in the morning when they're still warm from the oven. The coffee pairs perfectly with their signature croissants.

restaurants.name: Zhongyang Street Snowflake Beer Garden
restaurants.address: QJF9+3RH, Zhong Yang Da Jie, Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150020
restaurants.chinese: 中央大街雪花啤酒花园
restaurants.tip: Best visited during summer evenings when the beer garden atmosphere is lively. Try the grilled skewers paired with ice-cold Snowflake draft beer for an authentic Harbin experience.

cafes.name: The Best Coffee
cafes.address: Zhuo Zhan Gou Wu Zhong Xin ( Ha Er Bin Dian ) A Zuo, 2层106 An Long Jie, 106, Dao Li Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150010
cafes.tip: A cozy neighborhood spot in Daoli's central area. Perfect for warming up during Harbin's freezing winters with a hot latte and quiet atmosphere.

cafes.name: 快乐窗咖啡屋
cafes.address: 2 Mu Gong Jie, Nan Gang Qu, Ha Er Bin Shi, Hei Long Jiang Sheng, China, 150006
cafes.tip: A cozy neighborhood café in Daoli's central area. Visit during afternoon hours for a quieter atmosphere and try their hand-dripped coffee for an authentic coffee experience.

attractions.name: Changbaishan Scenic Area
attractions.address: 55MG+MV8, Antu County, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin, China, 133613
attractions.description: The North Slope offers the most accessible route to Changbaishan's stunning Heaven Lake crater, a sapphire jewel cradled in volcanic peaks at 2,189 meters. Marvel at roaring waterfalls, primeval forests, and hot springs that showcase the raw power of this sacred mountain.
attractions.tip: Visit between 6-9am for clearest views of Heaven Lake as afternoon clouds often obscure the crater. Bring a warm jacket even in summer—temperatures drop significantly at the summit.

attractions.name: Changbai Mountain
attractions.address: 3Q2P+JXR, Fusong County, Baishan, Jilin, China, 134512
attractions.description: An active volcanic massif straddling the China-North Korea border, crowned by the ethereal Heaven Lake crater at 2,189 meters. Come for the pristine alpine landscapes, cascading waterfalls, hot springs, and rare glimpses of volcanic peaks emerging through mist.
attractions.tip: Visit the North Slope entrance early morning before tour groups arrive, and bring multiple layers—temperatures at the summit can drop dramatically even in summer, with sudden weather changes common.

attractions.name: 长白瀑布
attractions.address: China, Ji Lin Sheng, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, An Tu Xian, 长白山北坡距天池1250米的地方 邮政编码: 133613
attractions.summary: Dramatic cliffside cascade of waters said to be sacred, into thermal pools vividly colored by algae.
attractions.description: A 68-meter cascade plunges dramatically from volcanic cliffs into vivid turquoise thermal pools colored by mineral-rich algae. The sacred waters and thunderous roar create one of Changbai Mountain's most powerful natural spectacles.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning between 7-9am when mist rises from the thermal pools and fewer tour groups crowd the viewing platforms. The 20-minute uphill walk from the drop-off point can be steep, so wear proper shoes.

attractions.name: Changbai Korean Folk Village
attractions.address: China, Ji Lin Sheng, Bai Shan Shi, Chang Bai Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Xian, 303省道马鹿沟镇果园村 邮政编码: 134402
attractions.description: This living cultural village showcases the traditions of Korea's ethnic minority in Northeast China through traditional architecture and daily customs. Experience authentic Korean-Chinese culture with folk performances, traditional ondol heated homes, and local handicraft demonstrations.
attractions.tip: Visit during lunch hours to join a family-style Korean meal in a traditional home—locals often prepare homemade kimchi and rice wine that aren't available in restaurants.

attractions.name: 长白山西坡景区
attractions.address: 229W+GV5, Fusong County, Baishan, Jilin, China, 134512
attractions.name_en: Changbai Mountain West Slope Scenic Area
attractions.description: The western approach to Changbai Mountain rewards adventurous visitors with dramatic canyon vistas and fewer crowds than the popular north slope. Climb 1,442 steps to reach the crater rim for sweeping views of Heaven Lake from a different perspective.
attractions.tip: Start your climb early morning to avoid afternoon fog that often obscures the lake view. Wear sturdy hiking shoes as the wooden stairway can be slippery after rain.

restaurants.name: Mr. Cheng's Restaurant
restaurants.address: Tunxi District, Huangshan City, China, 245000
restaurants.tip: Popular with skiers visiting Changbaishan's North Slope. Best for hearty Northeast Chinese dishes after a day on the mountain. Arrive early during peak winter season.

cafes.name: Knight Coffee City Coffee Station
cafes.address: 230 Xiang Dong Nan Lu, Tian Xin Qu, Chang Sha Shi, Hu Nan Sheng, China, 410021
cafes.tip: Perfect warming stop before or after exploring Changbaishan's North Slope. Arrive early morning for fresh brews before heading to the scenic area.

cafes.name: 啡客咖啡
cafes.address: China, Hu Nan Sheng, Chang Sha Shi, Yu Hua Qu, 芙蓉中路二段侯家塘佳天国际新城 邮政编码: 410117
cafes.tip: Perfect warm-up stop after visiting Changbai Mountain's north slope. Try their hot lattes to combat the mountain chill. Gets busy mid-morning with tour groups.

cafes.name: Kanon Coffee
cafes.address: 2Q4R+5R8, Min Hang Lu, Jing Hong Shi, Xi Shuang Ban Na Dai Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Yun Nan Sheng, China, 666100
cafes.tip: Warm up with a hot latte after morning activities on the snowy slopes. Arrive early during peak season as seating fills up quickly with skiers and hikers.

cafes.name: Fangbaili Cafe
cafes.address: HF69+PH6 A, 区六宿舍 Sha Ping Ba Jie Dao, Sha Ping Ba Qu, China, 400044
cafes.tip: Warm up with a hot coffee after exploring Changbaishan's north slope. Arrive early during peak season as seating is limited near the scenic area.

attractions.name: Changbaishan International Holiday Resort （East Gate）
attractions.address: 4G4M+FM5, Bai Yun Lu, Fu Song Xian, Bai Shan Shi, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 134511
attractions.chinese: 长白山国际度假区（东门）
attractions.description: A sprawling alpine resort village at the foot of Changbaishan Mountain, featuring ski slopes, hot springs, and European-style architecture. The resort serves as the premier base for exploring the volcanic peaks and pristine forests of the Changbai Mountain range.
attractions.tip: Buy your Changbaishan scenic area tickets at the resort's service center the night before to skip morning queues at the mountain entrance and catch the best weather windows for crater views.

attractions.name: Changbaishan Lu'Neng Ski Resort
attractions.address: China, 4, Fu Song Xian, Man Jiang Zhen, 公里处CN 吉林省 白山市 邮政编码: 134512
attractions.description: One of Northeast China's premier ski destinations sprawls across pristine mountain slopes near the Wanda Resort complex. World-class facilities and powder snow conditions attract skiers of all levels seeking adventure in Changbaishan's winter wonderland.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings to avoid crowds and get freshly groomed slopes. Rent equipment from the resort's shop early as popular sizes run out quickly during peak season.

attractions.name: Changbai Mountain Natural Ski Park
attractions.address: China, 长白山 Fu Song Xian, 西北坡CN 吉林省 白山市 邮政编码: 134512
attractions.description: Northeast China's premier ski destination sprawls across pristine powder slopes beneath volcanic peaks at Changbai Mountain. State-of-the-art facilities and consistent snow quality from November to April make this a winter sports paradise.
attractions.tip: Arrive at lift opening to enjoy freshly groomed runs before crowds. Rent equipment from Wanda Resort properties rather than on-mountain shops for better selection and competitive rates.

attractions.name: Changbaishan International Holiday Resort
attractions.address: 4G35+X9R, Fusong County, Baishan, Jilin, China, 134511
attractions.description: Northeast China's premier four-season mountain resort sits at the foot of volcanic Changbaishan, offering world-class skiing in winter and alpine adventures year-round. The sprawling complex blends luxury accommodations with direct access to pristine forests and the legendary Tianchi crater lake nearby.
attractions.tip: Visit the resort's free observation deck at sunset for stunning views of Changbaishan's peaks without entering the main scenic area. The resort shuttle buses run every 30 minutes to the mountain entrance.

attractions.name: Laolike Lake
attractions.address: China, Ji Lin Sheng, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, He Long Shi, 与安图县交界处甑峰山西北的老里克山顶 邮政编码: 133614
attractions.description: This serene alpine lake sits cradled between forested slopes in the Erdaobai River valley, its mirror-like surface reflecting the changing colors of Changbai's wilderness. The tranquil setting and relatively uncrowded trails make it a peaceful escape from the main scenic areas.
attractions.tip: Visit in early morning when mist often hovers over the water surface, creating ethereal photography conditions. The wooden boardwalk loop takes about 40 minutes at a leisurely pace.

restaurants.name: 海底捞火锅
restaurants.address: China, Su Zhou Shi, Kun Shan Shi, 环北路35号 邮政编码: 215335
restaurants.tip: Order the hand-pulled noodle performance at your table. Arrive before 6pm to avoid long waits, even in this smaller mountain town location.

restaurants.name: Fushanfang Restaurant
restaurants.address: VH6V+RX6, Song Jiang Dong Lu, Chang Yi Qu, Ji Lin Shi, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 132001
restaurants.tip: Popular spot for warming Northeast Chinese cuisine after mountain activities. Try the stewed dishes and wild mushrooms. Arrive early during peak tourist season as it fills up quickly.

cafes.name: Cafe Rottibun
cafes.address: WG67+GH2, Ju Zi Jie, Yan Ji Shi, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 133001
cafes.tip: Perfect warming stop after skiing or hiking in Changbaishan. Try their signature rotti buns with hot drinks to refuel during cold mountain weather.

cafes.name: Coffee Bene
cafes.address: WF5V+376, Gong Yuan Lu, Yan Ji Shi, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 133002
cafes.tip: Warm up with hot coffee after skiing or hiking. Popular Korean-style franchise offering reliable espresso drinks and desserts. Gets crowded during peak tourist season, visit mid-morning for quieter ambiance.

attractions.name: 吉林帽儿山国家森林公园
attractions.address: RFXF+M26, Yanji, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin, China, 133414
attractions.chinese: 吉林帽儿山国家森林公园
attractions.description: This forested mountain park near Yanji offers hiking trails through dense pine forests with panoramic views of the surrounding valleys. The distinctive hat-shaped peak provides a rewarding climb and serves as a natural escape from the city.
attractions.tip: Visit in early morning during weekdays to avoid crowds and catch the sunrise from the summit. The trail can be slippery after rain, so wear proper hiking shoes with good grip.

attractions.name: Cap child Hill Botanic Garden
attractions.address: RFVG+4VR, Yanji, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin, China, 133414
attractions.description: This hillside botanical garden near Yanji showcases alpine flora native to the Changbai Mountain region, with winding paths through carefully cultivated plant zones. The elevated position offers sweeping views across the valley, making it ideal for nature lovers seeking a peaceful escape.
attractions.tip: Visit in early morning when mist often rolls through the garden, creating ethereal photo opportunities among the mountain plants. The upper trails are less crowded and offer the best panoramic viewpoints.

attractions.name: Tumen Port
attractions.address: XV53+3WF, Kouan Ave, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, North Hamgyong, China
attractions.description: Standing at the frontier between China and North Korea, this border crossing offers a rare glimpse into one of the world's most isolated nations just across the Tumen River. The viewing platform provides fascinating perspectives of North Korean villages and daily life unfolding on the opposite bank.
attractions.tip: Visit in the morning when visibility is clearest and border activity is most active. Bring binoculars for better views of the North Korean side, and your passport as ID checks are common near the border zone.

restaurants.name: 清柱石锅饭龙井总店
restaurants.address: QCGG+279, Longjing, Jilin, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin, China, 133499
restaurants.name_en: Qingzhu Stone Pot Rice (Longjing Main Branch)
restaurants.tip: Order the signature stone pot rice with Korean-style toppings. Arrive early during lunch hours as the crispy rice crust takes time to prepare properly.

restaurants.name: Changlai Restaurant
restaurants.address: VCPH+VM3, Yanji, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin, China, 133401
restaurants.tip: Local spot serving northeastern Chinese cuisine. Try the hearty stews and wild mushroom dishes typical of the Changbai Mountain region. Arrive early during peak tourist season.

cafes.name: Hands Coffee
cafes.address: VGVC+RM2, Chang Bai Shan Lu, Yan Ji Shi, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 133099
cafes.tip: A highly-rated specialty coffee spot in Yanji. Perfect for warming up after exploring the mountains. Try their hand-drip coffee for the full artisanal experience.

cafes.name: Free Space Coffee Bar
cafes.address: VFV7+P32, Tian Chi Lu, Yan Ji Shi, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 133002
cafes.tip: Perfect warming stop after mountain excursions. Try their hot Americano paired with local pastries. Quiet atmosphere ideal for planning your next day's Changbaishan itinerary.

cafes.name: C.Straits Coffee House
cafes.address: China, North Hamgyong, Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Tumen, Long Tu Gong Lu, 日光山脚下原旅游服务中心
cafes.tip: Perfect warm-up spot after winter mountain activities. Try their hot coffee specialties paired with local pastries. Visit during off-peak afternoon hours for a quieter atmosphere.

cafes.name: Constellation Coffee
cafes.address: WF5R+3X2, Gong Yuan Lu, Yan Ji Shi, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Ji Lin Sheng, China, 133002
cafes.tip: Perfect warming stop before or after mountain trips. Ask for their signature hot lattes to combat the region's cold climate. Cozy atmosphere ideal for trip planning sessions.

cafes.name: Yijia Coffee
cafes.address: China, Ji Lin Sheng, Yan Bian Chao Xian Zu Zi Zhi Zhou, Yan Ji Shi, Tai Ping Jie, 1858号2层 邮政编码: 133001
cafes.tip: A cozy neighborhood spot perfect for warming up after exploring Changbaishan. Try their Americano paired with local pastries. Quietest in late afternoons.

attractions.name: Luhuitou Park
attractions.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, 鹿岭路 邮政编码: 572004
attractions.summary: A hilly park with views of Sanya city, resident monkeys & a beloved deer statue.
attractions.description: This hillside park crowns a peninsula with sweeping panoramas of Sanya Bay, the city skyline, and the South China Sea. The iconic deer sculpture celebrating a romantic local legend makes it a beloved spot for sunset viewing and cultural photography.
attractions.tip: Skip the daytime heat and arrive an hour before sunset to catch golden hour photos at the deer statue, then stay for the city lights turning on below.

attractions.name: Yalong Bay Tropic Paradise Forest Park
attractions.address: 6JXF+RV3, Ya Long Wan Lu, Ji Yang Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572011
attractions.summary: Tropical forest park with zip lines & a glass walkway through the treetops with views of Yalong Bay.
attractions.name_en: Yalong Bay Tropic Paradise Forest Park
attractions.chinese: 亚龙湾热带天堂森林公园
attractions.description: Lush tropical forest park cascading down mountains to Yalong Bay, featuring dramatic zip lines and a transparent glass bridge suspended through jungle canopy. The bird's-eye views of turquoise Yalong Bay framed by emerald rainforest make this Sanya's most photogenic adventure park.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before tour groups arrive to have the glass bridge practically to yourself. Wear comfortable shoes as the park involves steep climbing despite shuttle buses between zones.

attractions.name: 天涯海角
attractions.address: China, 海南省三亚市天涯区天涯镇78RX+PCR 邮政编码: 572029
attractions.summary: Tranquil park featuring sweeping, unobstructed sea views & dramatic rock formations.
attractions.name_en: Tianya Haijiao (Edge of the Sky, Corner of the Sea)
attractions.description: Legendary seaside park where massive ancient boulders carved with poetry rise from white sand beaches along turquoise waters. These iconic rocks symbolize eternal love and the ends of the earth, drawing visitors seeking both dramatic coastal scenery and cultural significance.
attractions.tip: Visit at sunrise around 6:30 AM to avoid tour groups and capture the best photos of the illuminated rock inscriptions with softer lighting that brings out the texture.

attractions.name: Nanshan Buddhist Cultural Garden
attractions.address: 76V3+83H, Yazhou District, Sanya, Hainan, China, 572024
attractions.description: This sprawling coastal Buddhist complex centers around the majestic 108-meter Guanyin statue rising from the South China Sea, one of the tallest statues in the world. Serene temple gardens, ornate halls, and ocean vistas create a spiritual retreat blending religious devotion with natural beauty.
attractions.tip: Visit the vegetarian restaurant inside Nanshan Temple for an authentic Buddhist feast buffet that's surprisingly elaborate and affordable. Arrive before 10am to avoid tour groups at the Guanyin statue.

attractions.name: Yalongwan Yuntian Tropical Park
attractions.address: 6MP2+75J, Jiyang District, Sanya, Sanya, Hainan, China, 572011
attractions.description: This hillside tropical park rises above Yalong Bay, offering elevated viewpoints draped in rainforest greenery and colorful flowering plants. Come for sweeping panoramic views of the crescent bay and its turquoise waters stretching to the horizon.
attractions.tip: Visit in the late afternoon around 4-5pm when the light is softer for photos and temperatures drop. The uphill walking trails can be steep, so wear comfortable shoes with good grip.

restaurants.name: Hai Yuan Shu Xiang Restaurant
restaurants.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Tian Ya Qu, Hai Tao Lu, 湾 邮政编码: 572023
restaurants.tip: Specializes in Sichuan cuisine with a seafood twist. Try their spicy fish dishes combining fresh Hainan seafood with bold Sichuan flavors. Book ahead during peak dinner hours.

restaurants.name: The Sanya EDITION
restaurants.address: 100 Hai Tang Bei Lu, Hai Tang Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572013
restaurants.tip: Book sunset dining at their beachfront restaurants for stunning Haitang Bay views. The resort features multiple dining venues, so check menus in advance to choose your preferred cuisine.

restaurants.name: Sanya Hong Kong, Macau and Cantonese Food Restaurant
restaurants.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, Yu Ya Lu, 榆亚大道2号鸿洲埃德瑞度假酒店1层 邮政编码: 572001
restaurants.name_en: Sanya Hong Kong, Macau and Cantonese Food Restaurant
restaurants.tip: Order the dim sum during lunch service for the freshest selection. Try the roast goose and char siu, classic Cantonese staples done well here.

restaurants.name: The Ritz Carlton Sanya
restaurants.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, 亚龙湾国家旅游度假区 邮政编码: 572011
restaurants.summary: Chic quarters in a posh beachfront hotel offering multiple dining options, an outdoor pool & a spa.
restaurants.tip: Book sunset dining at their beachfront restaurant for prime ocean views. The breakfast buffet offers excellent variety, but reservations are essential during peak holiday periods.

cafes.name: Fly Coffee
cafes.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, 19, 西北方向60米 邮政编码: 572012
cafes.tip: Perfect post-beach stop in Haitang Bay. Try their signature iced lattes to cool down after exploring nearby Atlantis resort and duty-free shopping complex.

cafes.name: Coast Coffee Shop
cafes.address: 207 San Ya Wan Lu, Tian Ya Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572023
cafes.tip: Perfect spot for a morning coffee before hitting Haitang Bay's beaches. Grab a seat by the window for ocean views while you sip.

cafes.name: Ka Coffee Bar
cafes.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Tian Ya Qu, 155, 湾红树林度假世界 邮政编码: 572008
cafes.tip: Perfect seaside coffee stop in Haitang Bay. Visit during late afternoon for stunning sunset views over the water while enjoying their signature espresso drinks.

cafes.name: Xiangcao Coffee House
cafes.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Tian Ya Qu, Hai Long Lu, 三亚椰林滩大酒店1层 邮政编码: 572023
cafes.tip: Visit during late afternoon to avoid the midday heat and enjoy sunset views over Haitang Bay while sipping their signature vanilla latte.

cafes.name: Coffee Time
cafes.address: 7G23+2Q3, Jie Fang Lu Bu Xing Jie, Tian Ya Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572000
cafes.tip: A convenient coffee stop in Haitang Bay's shopping district. Best for a quick caffeine fix between beach visits or mall shopping sessions.

attractions.name: Yalongwan Forest Tourism Area
attractions.address: 7J4P+7CH, Jiyang District, Sanya, Sanya, China, 572011
attractions.chinese: 亚龙湾热带天堂森林公园
attractions.description: Lush rainforest park sprawls across mountain slopes overlooking Yalong Bay's turquoise waters, offering dramatic coastal vistas from elevated walkways and observation decks. The famous glass bridge and filming locations from the movie 'If You Are the One 2' draw visitors seeking panoramic photo opportunities.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before 9am to avoid tour groups and enjoy clearer mountain air. Take the shuttle bus uphill and walk down through the canopy bridges to save energy for photos at the best viewpoints.

attractions.name: 呀诺达雨林
attractions.address: Baoting Li and Miao Autonomous County, China, 572316
attractions.description: A lush tropical rainforest park in Sanya's hinterland where ancient trees, rushing waterfalls, and mist-shrouded valleys create a jungle wonderland. Come for canopy walkways through pristine rainforest and thrilling zip-line adventures high above the emerald valley floor.
attractions.tip: Arrive right at opening to avoid tour groups and experience the rainforest at its most tranquil. Bring a lightweight rain jacket as afternoon showers are common in the valley, creating magical misty conditions.

restaurants.name: Sanya Yalongwan Yiyi Beer Rest.
restaurants.address: China, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, CN 海南省 三亚市 吉阳区 申亚亚龙湾1号小镇 G 层FG009 邮政编码: 572011
restaurants.chinese: 三亚亚龙湾依依啤酒屋
restaurants.tip: Popular spot for cold draft beer and grilled seafood after a beach day. Visit during sunset hours for the best atmosphere and fresher catches.

cafes.name: Marriott Cafe
cafes.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, 亚龙湾国家旅游度假区万豪度假酒店 邮政编码: 572011
cafes.tip: Visit during breakfast buffet hours for the best value and variety. Ocean-view window seats fill up fast, so arrive early or reserve ahead.

cafes.name: 星巴克
cafes.address: 1 Hai Yun Lu, Ji Yang Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572019
cafes.summary: Welcoming coffeehouse with handcrafted coffee, espresso & tea, plus breakfast, lunch & pastries.
cafes.tip: Visit during morning hours to avoid tourist crowds from nearby resorts. Try the regional Hainan coconut latte, exclusive to island locations. Outdoor seating offers bay views.

cafes.name: Blue Moon Coffee House
cafes.address: China, San Ya Shi, Ji Yang Qu, CN 海南省 三亚市 吉阳区 1 楼 邮政编码: 572004
cafes.tip: Perfect spot for a post-beach coffee break. Try their iced Americano to cool down after exploring Yalong Bay's beaches. Quietest during late afternoons before sunset.

cafes.name: Dujin Coffee
cafes.address: 6GFF+7R6, Dong Hai Lu, Ji Yang Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572019
cafes.tip: Visit in the morning to escape Yalong Bay's midday heat. Try their signature cold brew—perfect refreshment after a beach walk. Seating fills up quickly on weekends.

attractions.name: 三亚湾
attractions.address: 7FHC+P5F, Tianya District, Sanya, Hainan, China, 572023
attractions.summary: Expansive, prominent bay bordered by 2 peninsulas, with a large recreational beach & walking paths.
attractions.description: A sweeping 22-kilometer crescent bay flanked by dramatic peninsulas, where coconut-lined promenades meet powder-soft sand. Come for spectacular sunset views over the South China Sea and leisurely beachside strolls away from the resort crowds.
attractions.tip: Visit the western end near Coconut Dream Corridor around 5-6pm for the best sunset shots with fewer tourists. Local seafood restaurants along Yuya Road offer better prices than beachfront hotels.

attractions.name: Yalong Bay Int'l. Rose Valley
attractions.address: China, 9, Ji Yang Qu, Bo Hou Bei Lu, 9号CN 海南省 三亚市 邮政编码: 572011
attractions.description: A sprawling hillside garden showcasing thousands of rose varieties alongside tropical flowers, with valley views stretching toward Yalong Bay's coastline. The terraced gardens and colorful blooms create picture-perfect backdrops, especially appealing to photography enthusiasts and flower lovers.
attractions.tip: Visit in the early morning between 8-10am when roses are freshest and temperatures are cooler for walking the hillside paths. The upper terraces offer the best panoramic valley views with fewer crowds.

restaurants.name: Casamia Restaurant Pizzerla
restaurants.address: 88 San Ya Wan Lu, Tian Ya Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572008
restaurants.tip: Order the wood-fired Margherita pizza—it's authentic Italian style. Visit during weekday lunch for a quieter atmosphere and potential discounts on set menus.

restaurants.name: Diadiade Coconut Chicken Sanya Bay Store
restaurants.address: Lacosta Hotel, 1楼167 San Ya Wan Lu, 167, Tian Ya Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572023
restaurants.name_en: Diadiade Coconut Chicken Sanya Bay Store
restaurants.chinese: 爹爹嗲嗲椰子鸡三亚湾店
restaurants.tip: Order the signature coconut chicken hotpot with free-range chicken. The coconut water base is naturally sweet. Arrive early during dinner as this popular spot fills quickly with locals.

restaurants.name: Qiongxiangge Hainan Cai Restaurant (Sanya Bay Store)
restaurants.address: China, 8, Tian Ya Qu, Ji Chang Lu, 8号CN 海南省 三亚市 邮政编码: 572008
restaurants.name_en: Qiongxiangge Hainan Cai Restaurant (Sanya Bay Store)
restaurants.chinese: 琼湘阁海南菜餐厅(三亚湾店)
restaurants.tip: Order the Wenchang chicken, a Hainan specialty with tender poached meat and ginger-scallion dip. Arrive early during peak season as this local favorite fills up quickly at dinner.

attractions.name: Tianyahaijiao Tourism Area
attractions.address: 78VX+X46, Tianya District, Sanya, China, 572029
attractions.description: Massive weathered boulders inscribed with Chinese calligraphy dot a dramatic coastline where legend says lovers who visit together will stay together forever. The iconic rocks framed by turquoise waters create one of Hainan's most photographed landscapes.
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon for softer light and smaller crowds. Skip the overpriced electric carts—the scenic coastal walk between the main rocks takes only 20 minutes and offers better photo opportunities.

attractions.name: Tianyahaijiao Planet Sculpture
attractions.address: 78RX+JW6, Tianya District, Sanya, Hainan, China, 572029
attractions.description: This striking spherical sculpture stands as a modern landmark within the famous Tianya Haijiao scenic area, contrasting ancient romance with contemporary art. It offers a unique photo opportunity beyond the traditional stone inscriptions.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning when tour groups focus on the main beach rocks first, giving you clear shots of the sculpture without crowds blocking your frame.

restaurants.name: Sanya Xianggechuan Hunan Flavor Restaurant
restaurants.address: 116 Xin Min Jie, Tian Ya Qu, San Ya Shi, Hai Nan Sheng, China, 572001
restaurants.tip: Order the signature spicy fish head with pickled peppers and dry-pot dishes. Request less oil if you're not used to authentic Hunan-style cooking.

cafes.name: Zizaixuan Coffee Book Bar
cafes.address: China, Hai Nan Sheng, San Ya Shi, Tian Ya Qu, 169, 正南方向50米 邮政编码: 572008
cafes.tip: Perfect quiet retreat from Sanya's tourist crowds. Come in the afternoon for coffee and reading time. The book selection focuses on travel and local culture.

attractions.name: Gulangyu Wharf
attractions.address: C3WF+G8P, Siming District, Xiamen, Fujian, China, 361001
attractions.description: This historic ferry terminal serves as the gateway to car-free Gulangyu Island, where colonial architecture meets ocean breezes. The wharf itself offers sweeping views of Xiamen's evolving skyline across the shimmering harbor waters.
attractions.tip: Take ferries from Xiamen International Cruise Center Terminal instead of Xiamen Ferry Terminal during peak seasons to avoid massive crowds and enjoy better views during the crossing.

attractions.name: One Hundred Years Of Gulangyu Island
attractions.address: 62 Fu Jian Lu, Si Ming Qu, Xia Men Shi, Fu Jian Sheng, China, 361001
attractions.name_en: One Hundred Years Of Gulangyu Island
attractions.description: This exhibition chronicles Gulangyu Island's fascinating transformation from a colonial trading port to a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Through vintage photographs, artifacts, and architectural displays, visitors gain deep insight into the island's unique blend of Eastern and Western cultural heritage.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning on weekdays to avoid tour groups and have the exhibits to yourself. The upstairs section contains rare historical photographs of old Xiamen that most visitors miss.

attractions.name: Gulang Dongtian
attractions.address: 62 Huang Yan Lu, Si Ming Qu, Xia Men Shi, Fu Jian Sheng, China, 361001
attractions.description: This historic cave formation on Gulangyu Island features dramatic rock formations and winding pathways carved through natural stone. The site offers a unique geological perspective of the island with cool, shaded passages perfect for escaping Xiamen's summer heat.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before 9am to avoid tour groups and catch the best natural lighting filtering through the cave openings for photography.

attractions.name: Haoyueyuan
attractions.address: 3 Zhang Zhou Lu, Si Ming Qu, Xia Men Shi, Fu Jian Sheng, China, 361002
attractions.description: This seaside garden on Gulangyu Island showcases a towering 15-meter statue of national hero Zheng Chenggong gazing across the strait toward Taiwan. The waterfront location offers sweeping views of Xiamen's skyline framed by rocky shores and crashing waves.
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon when tour groups thin out and the golden light creates perfect conditions for photographing the statue against the sea. The rocks by the water make excellent foreground elements.

attractions.name: Longshandong
attractions.address: C3X9+4PM, Gu Xin Lu, Si Ming Qu, Xia Men Shi, Fu Jian Sheng, China, 361001
attractions.description: This natural sea cave carved into the rocky coastline of Gulangyu Island offers dramatic views of crashing waves and weathered stone formations. The cave's unique geological features and cooling sea breeze make it a refreshing escape from the island's busier attractions.
attractions.tip: Visit during low tide when you can safely explore deeper into the cave and stand on the exposed rocks at the entrance for dramatic photos without getting splashed.

restaurants.name: Yijia
restaurants.address: China, Xia Men Shi, Si Ming Qu, CN 福建省 厦门市 思明区 建业路 8 8号104室 邮政编码: 361012
restaurants.tip: Popular spot on Gulangyu Island, so arrive early during peak tourist hours to avoid long waits. Ask for local seafood specialties if available that day.

restaurants.name: Bollo
restaurants.address: 53-121 Long Shan Zhong Lu, 53, Si Ming Qu, Xia Men Shi, Fu Jian Sheng, China, 361008
restaurants.tip: This highly-rated spot on Gulangyu Island offers a peaceful escape from tourist crowds. Visit during off-peak hours for the best atmosphere and service.
